svg.title: 6-position DIP switch block SW1 to SW6 in state OFF ON OFF ON ON OFF
svg.desc: Motor driver DIP configuration. SW1 OFF open loop, SW2 ON speed source AI2, SW3 OFF, SW4 and SW5 ON five pole pairs, SW6 OFF no RS485. Both drivers identical.
svg.text: SW1 → SW6 = OFF · ON · OFF · ON · ON · OFF
Open loop — Teensy PID is the sole regulator
Speed source = AI2 (external 0–5 V PWM input)
No function assigned in this configuration
